title: Expressions creating dictionaries should not have duplicate keys
description: This rule checks for expressions creating dictionaries with duplicate keys.
message: Duplicate keys found in dictionary creation.
recommendation: Use unique keys when creating dictionaries.

compliant.description: No duplicate keys in dictionary creation.

why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicate keys can lead to unexpected behavior and confusion when working with dictionaries.
how_to_fix: Ensure unique keys are used when creating dictionaries.
